ai-for-leaders/algorithms-high-level-ove.title: High-Level Breadth of Classical Machine Learning Algorithms
ai-for-leaders/algorithms-high-level-ove.description: As a leader, you don't need to understand the mathematical complexities behind machine learning algorithms, but you do need to know which tools work best for different business challenges. This guide provides an intuitive overview of the most commonly used classical ML algorithms, helping you make informed decisions about AI initiatives in your organization.

ai-for-leaders/classical-ml-in-market.title: Where Classical Machine Learning Models Are Used in the Market
ai-for-leaders/classical-ml-in-market.description: As a product leader at a major tech company, you're constantly evaluating which AI approaches will give you the fastest time-to-market, clearest ROI, and most sustainable competitive advantage. The ML landscape isn't just about choosing the "best" algorithm—it's about choosing the right tool for your specific market position, data constraints, and business timeline.

ai-for-leaders/classification-regression.title: ML Problems: Classification, Regression, and Learning Approaches
ai-for-leaders/classification-regression.description: Now that you understand the fundamentals of machine learning, let's dive deeper into the different types of problems ML can solve and how machines approach learning. This knowledge will help you identify the right AI solutions for your specific business challenges.

ai-for-leaders/curriculum-overview.title: AI for Leaders: Complete Curriculum Overview
ai-for-leaders/curriculum-overview.description: This document provides the hierarchical structure and learning progression for the AI for Leaders curriculum. It's designed to guide leaders from foundational concepts to advanced AI strategy and implementation.

ai-for-leaders/curriculum-tree.title: Interactive Curriculum Tree
ai-for-leaders/curriculum-tree.description: Welcome to the AI for Leaders Interactive Curriculum Tree - your personalized roadmap through the complete AI for Leaders program. This interactive visualization replaces traditional flat curriculum lists with an engaging, gamified learning experience designed specifically for business leaders.

ai-for-leaders/curriculum-visual-tree.title: AI for Leaders: Visual Curriculum Tree

ai-for-leaders/intro.title: AI for Leaders
ai-for-leaders/intro.description: Welcome to AI for Leaders - a comprehensive resource designed specifically for business leaders, executives, and decision-makers who need to understand artificial intelligence without diving into technical complexities.

ai-for-leaders/machine-learning-fundamen.title: Understanding Machine Learning Fundamentals
ai-for-leaders/machine-learning-fundamen.description: As a leader in today's data-driven world, understanding machine learning isn't just about staying current with technology—it's about making informed strategic decisions that can transform your business. This guide will walk you through the essential concepts of machine learning in clear, business-focused terms.

deep-learning/CNNS.title: Deep Learning for Computer Vision and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs)
deep-learning/CNNS.description: Chapter 1: Teaching Machines to See — The Fundamentals of Computer Vision

deep-learning/intro.title: Introduction to Deep Learning
deep-learning/intro.description: Deep Learning is a subset of machine learning that uses neural networks with multiple layers (deep neural networks) to analyze various forms of data. While traditional machine learning algorithms require feature extraction by human experts, deep learning systems can automatically discover the representations needed for detection or classification from raw data.

machine-learning/supervised-learning.title: Supervised Learning
machine-learning/supervised-learning.description: Supervised learning is a type of machine learning where the model is trained on labeled data. In this approach, the algorithm learns from a training dataset that includes both input features and their corresponding correct outputs.

resources/intro.title: AI & ML Resources
resources/intro.description: This section provides a curated collection of resources for machine learning, deep learning, and language models. Whether you're just starting your journey or looking to deepen your expertise, you'll find valuable tools, datasets, libraries, and educational materials here.

tutorials/logistic-regression.title: Interactive Logistic Regression Tutorial
tutorials/logistic-regression.description: Learn logistic regression through hands-on visualization and interactive animations
